ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity (e.g., Kids Zone, Bar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the activity within the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people allowed in the activity area */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Target age group for the activity */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity being scheduled */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Mon, Tue, Wed) */,
  "opening_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the activity */,
  "closing_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the activity */,
  "special_event" INTEGER /* Indicates if the schedule is for a special event */,
  "maintenance_schedule" INTEGER /* Indicates if the schedule includes maintenance hours */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member responsible for the activity during this schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability entry */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status (e.g., Open, Closed, Specific hours) */,
  "specific_hours" TEXT /* Specific hours of availability if not open/closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_availability_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Manager, Supervisor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the staff member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the staff member */,
  "shift_start" TEXT /* Start time of the staff member's shift */,
  "shift_end" TEXT /* End time of the staff member's shift */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the reservation */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "number_of_people" INTEGER /* Number of people for the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., Confirmed, Pending, Cancelled) */,
  "reservation_time" TEXT /* Specific time of the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity being reviewed */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the activity (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_feedback_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the activity being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what maintenance was performed */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id")
)
